title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Johnson & Johnson India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Johnson & Johnson India
jsonLd.description:
Johnson & Johnson India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Johnson & Johnson India:
Johnson & Johnson India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India!
